title: Ziwei year, late-Zi, and leap-month boundary policies

positions.summary: Require explicit versioned policies and default to lunar-new-year, current-day late-Zi, and preserved leap-month numbering.
Use spring-commences, next-day late-Zi, or split-after-fifteenth leap-month policies when explicitly selected.

sources.locator: historical leap-month rule and boundary formula context

default_policy.rationale: Explicit defaults make replay deterministic while retaining alternate policies as opt-in parameters.

user_disclosure: The chart records its year-boundary, late-Zi, and leap-month policies; changing them may change structural facts.
